description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a driveway with a parked car, a garage, and a landscaped yard with several trees and shrubs. Large windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, surrounded by additional greenery. The house is constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some wooden and metal elements visible in the structure and detailing. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, fitting well within a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, a garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front and right side view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear and left side view highlighting the backyard, patio, swimming pool, and additional trees.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the backyard patio, pool, and rear facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Left side and partial rear view showing the driveway, garage, and backyard with pool and patio furniture.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, and adjacent garage; no porch or columns, minimalistic modern style.
